[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000110 2
1 1101111 6
2 0110001 3
3 0110110 4
4 1100010 3
5 1001110 4
6 1101001 4
7 1110011 5

70 07 0110000 2

72 27 0000000 a
